expression.label: text3
expression.exp: "題一 移動 3 根火柴，令下圖變成六個正方形。"

expression.label: text4
expression.exp: "題二 移動 2 根火柴，令下圖變成四個一樣大小的正方形。"

expression.label: text5
expression.exp: "題三 移動 3 根火柴，令下圖變成三個正方形。"

expression.label: text6
expression.exp: "題四 移動 4 根火柴，令下圖變成三個正方形。"

expression.label: text7
expression.exp: "題五 移動 6 根火柴，令下圖變成兩個正方形。"

expression.label: text9
expression.exp: "題六 移動 4 根火柴，令下圖變成九個正方形。"

expression.label: text10
expression.exp: "題七 移動 4 根火柴，令下圖變成三個正方形。"

ggbscript.onUpdate:
SetValue[o_1, false]
SetValue[o_2, false]
SetValue[o_3, true]
SetValue[o_4, false]
SetValue[o_5, false]
SetValue[o_6, false]
SetValue[o_7, false]
SetValue[u, 3]
SetValue[answer, false]

SetValue[o_1, false]
SetValue[o_2, false]
SetValue[o_3, false]
SetValue[o_4, false]
SetValue[o_5, false]
SetValue[o_6, true]
SetValue[o_7, false]
SetValue[u, 6]
SetValue[answer, false]

SetValue[o_1, true]
SetValue[o_2, false]
SetValue[o_3, false]
SetValue[o_4, false]
SetValue[o_5, false]
SetValue[o_6, false]
SetValue[o_7, false]
SetValue[u, 1]
SetValue[answer, false]

SetValue[o_1, false]
SetValue[o_2, true]
SetValue[o_3, false]
SetValue[o_4, false]
SetValue[o_5, false]
SetValue[o_6, false]
SetValue[o_7, false]
SetValue[u, 2]
SetValue[answer, false]

SetValue[o_1, false]
SetValue[o_2, false]
SetValue[o_3, false]
SetValue[o_4, true]
SetValue[o_5, false]
SetValue[o_6, false]
SetValue[o_7, false]
SetValue[u, 4]
SetValue[answer, false]

SetValue[o_1, false]
SetValue[o_2, false]
SetValue[o_3, false]
SetValue[o_4, false]
SetValue[o_5, true]
SetValue[o_6, false]
SetValue[o_7, false]
SetValue[u, 5]
SetValue[answer, false]

SetValue[o_1, false]
SetValue[o_2, false]
SetValue[o_3, false]
SetValue[o_4, false]
SetValue[o_5, false]
SetValue[o_6, false]
SetValue[o_7, true]
SetValue[u, 7]
SetValue[answer, false]
